label: FAIL
rationale: The target Set writes Log row column 0x08 MonotonicTime. The provided Log table source identifies column 0x08 as MonotonicTime, and section 5.8.2.1.9 says this column SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host, so a SUCCESS response is not protocol-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target Set writes Log row column 0x0D Data. The provided Log table source identifies column 0x0D as Data, and section 5.8.2.1.14 says this column SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host, so a SUCCESS response is not protocol-compliant.
